items.title: ICRA

alternate_sources.note: Intermediate extension announcement moved the author registration deadline to March 13, 2026.
Older call-for-papers page still lists March 6, 2026 for author registration.

items.raw: The registration page states “Author registration deadline: 6 March 2026, finally extended to March 31, 2026.”
items.notes: Marked as an extension because the registration page explicitly says the author deadline was finally extended. The same page ties this deadline to paper retention in the program and proceedings.
items.conflict_note: Official ICRA pages disagree: the older call-for-papers page lists March 6, 2026, a later announcement extends it to March 13, 2026, and the registration page gives the latest official status as finally extended to March 31, 2026. The registration page was used as the highest-priority current official source.

items.title: RoboSoft

alternate_sources.note: The broader call-for-papers page summarizes extended abstracts as February 15, 2026 without the GMT conversion details.

items.raw: Extended abstracts submission: 8:00 AM on February 16, 2026 (GMT, UTC-0) = 11:59 PM on February 15, 2026 (PST).
items.notes: Used the dedicated extended-abstracts page because it is more specific than the general call-for-papers summary. The page gives both GMT and PST equivalents; normalized date follows the stated GMT submission date.
items.conflict_note: The general call-for-papers page says February 15, 2026 for extended abstracts, while the dedicated extended-abstracts page states 8:00 AM GMT on February 16, 2026 (equivalent to 11:59 PM PST on February 15, 2026). The dedicated page was treated as authoritative.
items.change_summary: New deadline entry in the latest refresh.
